lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Outfitting database — passenger-cabin classes and slot sizing that decide each hull’s cabin capacity.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Passenger Carrier
sources.what: Passenger career mechanics and mission types the suitability ratings target.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Passenger Cabin
sources.what: Cabin classes (Economy–Luxury) and per-hull cabin capacity referenced here.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Update overview of the Lynx Highliner passenger ship and reworked passenger-mission mechanics, covering cabin classes and VIP versus bulk-economy work.
